def negative_repeated_list_index_lookup():
    rule_id = "repeated_list_index_lookup"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "The same list index lookup is performed repeatedly instead of caching the accessed value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
